name: CMS: Production AI Observability
description: Production AI systems implement observability — traces, evaluations (EVALs), and key metrics tracked over time.
rationale: CMS Monitoring & Observability: track traces, EVALs, prompt management/versioning and key metrics for production AI systems, aligned with OMB M-25-21/M-25-22.

examples.passes: the CMS AI rule's evidence is present

source: CMS Technical Reference Architecture (TRA) — Artificial Intelligence Guidance (Business Rules BR-AI-1..6 and recommended practices; references OMB M-25-21/M-25-22, NIST AI RMF, HHS AI policy). https://www.cms.gov/tra/Foundation/FD_0080_Foundation_AI_Guidance.htm
